industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Jilin Province Chuncheng Heating Company Limited
summary: Jilin Province Chuncheng Heating Company Limited provides heat supply services in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the provision, distribution, and transmission of heat; and pipeline connection activities. As of December 31, 2019, its heat service area consisted of approximately 39.5 million square meters. The company also offers engineering construction and maintenance; design, consulting, and feasibility studies related to heating projects; electrical and instrument maintenance and repair services; and supplies biomass heat. It serves approximately 320,000 residential and non-residential users. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Changchun, China. Jilin Province Chuncheng Heating Company Limited is a subsidiary of Changchun Heating Power (Group) Company Limited.
